products.name: Ultra Series 9 Smartwatch (AMOLED Display)
products.shortDescription: AMOLED smartwatch with health tracking, sports modes, and long battery life.
products.description: A sharp AMOLED smartwatch for everyday calls, alerts, fitness tracking, sleep monitoring, and quick style changes with a premium strap-ready body.

products.name: Transparent TWS Earbuds with ANC
products.shortDescription: Transparent-style wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation.
products.description: Lightweight true wireless earbuds with a transparent aesthetic, ANC listening modes, touch controls, and a compact charging case for daily commutes.

products.name: MagSafe Magnetic Power Bank (10000mAh)
products.shortDescription: Magnetic 10000mAh power bank for compatible phones and USB-C devices.
products.description: A pocket-ready magnetic power bank with 10000mAh capacity, wireless top-ups for compatible phones, and USB-C charging for travel days.

products.name: 65W GaN Fast Adapter (Dual Type-C)
products.shortDescription: Compact 65W GaN wall adapter with dual USB-C output.
products.description: A compact GaN fast charger built for phones, tablets, earbuds, and compatible laptops, with dual Type-C output for travel-friendly charging.

products.name: 3-in-1 Foldable Wireless Charging Station
products.shortDescription: Foldable wireless station for phone, watch, and earbuds.
products.description: A desk-friendly foldable charging station designed to charge a phone, smartwatch, and earbuds in one tidy setup with travel-ready folding.

products.name: 1TB Portable NVMe SSD (High Speed)
products.shortDescription: High-speed 1TB portable NVMe SSD for creators and backups.
products.description: A compact 1TB NVMe portable SSD for fast file transfers, photo libraries, video projects, and secure everyday backup workflows.

products.name: Liquid Silicone Case for iPhone 15 Pro Max
products.shortDescription: Soft-touch silicone protection for iPhone 15 Pro Max.
products.description: A slim liquid silicone case with a soft-touch finish, raised edges, and everyday scratch protection for iPhone 15 Pro Max.

products.name: RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (Glassmorphism Style)
products.shortDescription: Mechanical RGB keyboard with a clean translucent desk aesthetic.
products.description: A tactile mechanical keyboard with RGB lighting, a modern translucent-inspired look, and responsive keys for gaming and desk setups.

products.name: Wireless Gaming Mouse with RGB
products.shortDescription: Wireless RGB mouse for smooth everyday gaming.
products.description: A lightweight wireless gaming mouse with RGB lighting, responsive tracking, and a comfortable shape for long gaming sessions.

products.name: 7-in-1 Type-C Multiport Hub
products.shortDescription: USB-C hub with essential ports for workstations and travel.
products.description: A compact Type-C multiport hub for connecting HDMI, USB devices, storage, and charging passthrough from a single laptop port.

products.name: Active Noise Cancelling Over-Ear Headphones
products.shortDescription: Over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation.
products.description: Comfortable over-ear headphones with ANC, cushioned earcups, wireless listening, and clear calls for office, travel, and study sessions.

products.name: Smart RGB Desk Lamp with Wireless Charging
products.shortDescription: RGB desk lamp with wireless charging for modern workspaces.
products.description: A smart RGB desk lamp that adds ambience, task lighting, and wireless phone charging to a clean work-from-home or gaming desk setup.

products.name: 14-inch Ring Light with Tripod Stand
products.shortDescription: 14-inch creator ring light with tripod stand.
products.description: A bright 14-inch ring light with tripod support for creators, video calls, product shoots, makeup content, and social media recording.

products.name: Braided 100W Type-C to Type-C Fast Cable
products.shortDescription: Braided USB-C to USB-C cable rated for fast charging.
products.description: A durable braided Type-C to Type-C cable for fast charging and daily data use with phones, tablets, and compatible laptops.

products.name: Magnetic Smart Folio Keyboard for iPad
products.shortDescription: Magnetic folio keyboard case for iPad productivity.
products.description: A magnetic smart folio keyboard that turns compatible iPads into a lightweight writing, browsing, and productivity setup.

products.name: Premium Leather Laptop Sleeve (14-inch)
products.shortDescription: Slim 14-inch leather-style laptop sleeve.
products.description: A premium leather-style laptop sleeve for 14-inch laptops, with a clean profile for daily office, college, and travel carry.

products.name: Gaming Finger Sleeves (Pack of 4)
products.shortDescription: Pack of four finger sleeves for mobile gaming control.
products.description: A pack of four lightweight gaming finger sleeves made for smoother mobile screen control and reduced friction during long matches.

products.name: Car Dashboard Mount with Wireless Charging
products.shortDescription: Car dashboard phone mount with wireless charging support.
products.description: A dashboard-friendly phone mount with wireless charging support, adjustable viewing angles, and a secure hold for daily drives.

products.name: Smartphone Gimbal Stabilizer (3-Axis)
products.shortDescription: 3-axis smartphone gimbal for smoother handheld video.
products.description: A 3-axis smartphone gimbal stabilizer for smoother reels, vlogs, travel videos, motion timelapses, and creator-friendly handheld shots.

products.name: Bluetooth Calling Smartwatch (Round Dial)
products.shortDescription: Round-dial smartwatch with Bluetooth calling.
products.description: A round-dial Bluetooth calling smartwatch for daily notifications, fitness tracking, voice calls, and a classic watch-inspired look.
